description: A hospital pharmacy in Germany is implementing EU Falsified Medicines Directive (FMD) compliance scanning. Under EU FMD, all prescription medications carry serialized 2D DataMatrix codes that must be scanned to verify authenticity before dispensing. The pharmacy is deploying bcWebCam as their FMD scanner. The current configuration has linear barcodes enabled (used for a previous workflow) with no DataMatrix support, Enter terminating character, and no duplicate prevention. Reconfigure bcWebCam for EU FMD pharmaceutical scanning: disable ALL linear barcodes (they cause false reads from drug box lot-number labels), enable DataMatrix 2D code scanning, remove the terminating character (the hospital's FMD verification system handles its own delimiters), and set 1-second duplicate prevention (the same medicine box must not be scanned twice).
